head.title: Somnath Dwarka 6 Days 5 Nights: The Full Loop, No Backtrack
head.meta: Five nights, one loop, zero repeated highway. Dwarka, Somnath, Gir and Junagadh from Rs.25,000 pp with hotel, breakfast and vehicle included.
head.h1: Somnath Dwarka Package 6 Days 5 Nights: Itinerary, Price and Booking

quick_answer: A 6 days 5 nights Somnath Dwarka package costs Rs. 25,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 50,000 at 4 star and Rs. 62,500 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and your vehicle included. Five nights is the version that stops being a there-and-back and becomes a loop: Ahmedabad to Dwarka up the coast, down NH51 to Somnath, inland to Gir, out through Junagadh and home. You never drive the same highway twice. This is the plan for people who will make this trip once and want it to be complete.

decision.title: Why the loop matters more than the extra nights
intro: The 4 and 5 day plans are shaped like a line. You go out and you come back, and the return leg is 410 km of road you have already seen from the other window.
Five nights lets the route close into a circle:
Ahmedabad → Dwarka (up the Jamnagar side) → Somnath (down the coastal NH51) → Sasan Gir (inland) → Junagadh (north) → Ahmedabad.
Same total driving. Roughly two thirds of it is new ground rather than a rerun. That is what the fifth night actually buys, and it is why we push this plan at groups making a single trip.
Next step: send your dates and group size and we will confirm the loop direction and the fourth night.
table: Evening darshan after the long haul
Bet Dwarka, the bridge, Nageshwar, the ghat, unhurried
The 7:00 pm aarti and the 7:45 pm show
Dawn safari, or the beach if the Trail is shut
Girnar at the foot of the hill, and it breaks the drive home

days.title: Days 1 to 3
days.note: The spine of the 4 days 3 nights plan, unchanged and unhurried: pre-sunrise pickup at Ahmedabad for the 440 to 450 km run, evening darshan at Dwarkadhish, the 6:30 am Mangala Aarti, Bet Dwarka across Sudarshan Setu, Nageshwar and Rukmini Devi, then the 233 km coastal run through Porbandar to Somnath for the Sandhya Aarti and the Jay Somnath show.

steps.activity: Bhalka Tirth, Triveni Sangam, Geeta Mandir, Ahalyabai temple.
Drive to Sasan Gir, about 60 to 70 km.
Check in. Light afternoon on purpose.
Evening safari if your permit falls here.
Report at Sinh Sadan, 30 minutes before your slot, with the original ID you booked on.
Morning Jungle Trail safari, about 3 hours, routes assigned by the forest department.
Check in, then the town at its own pace.
Girnar at the foot, the Uparkot side, and an early night if anyone is climbing.

days.title: Day 6: Junagadh to Ahmedabad

steps.activity: Optional Girnar start for anyone climbing. It is a long ascent and it is not a casual morning.
Drive to Ahmedabad, roughly a full day with stops.
Drop at airport, station or home.

days.note: The Gir closure applies here too. The Jungle Trail is shut every year from 16 June to 15 October. Inside that window we run the loop through Diu instead of Sasan Gir and the fifth night moves accordingly. Details on the 5 days 4 nights page.

rows: The Fern Sattva Resort at Dwarka, best available elsewhere on the loop
notes: Rates are Rs. 5,000, Rs. 10,000 and Rs. 12,500 per person per night, times five nights. On a loop this long the 5 star tier is worth a conversation, because the top rooms in Dwarka, Somnath and Gir are not the same class as the top rooms in Ahmedabad, and the tier is honest about that.

Not included: the Gir permit, gypsy and guide, which are paid to the forest department; the Girnar ropeway or any ticket at Junagadh; lunch and dinner; personal pooja and seva; the sound and light show ticket; camera and cloakroom charges; tips; personal spending.
General darshan is free at both temples. The Shree Somnath Trust accepts bookings and donations only through its own official website, never through private numbers or UPI.

why_choose.title: Why choose Experience My India for the full loop
points: We route it as a circle. Two thirds of your driving is new ground rather than a rerun, and the map on this page is the reason.
We are honest about the 5 star tier. The best room in Dwarka is not the best room in Ahmedabad, and we say so before you pay for the difference.
We check the Gir calendar before we quote. The Jungle Trail is shut 16 June to 15 October and the loop reroutes through Diu.
A local Gujarat team. The people planning your six days drive these roads.
One number, answered by a planner. +91 7302265809 on call and WhatsApp.
Timings verified in July 2026 and reconfirmed before departure.
Cancellation and refund terms are on the cancellation and refund page, booking terms on the booking policy page. More at about, our Gujarat team and methodology.

faq.question: Is 6 days enough for the whole Saurashtra circuit?
faq.answer: Yes. Five nights covers Dwarka with a full island day, Somnath with both aartis, Gir with a dawn safari and Junagadh on the way home, as a loop rather than a there-and-back.

faq.question: What does a 6 days 5 nights Somnath Dwarka package cost?
faq.answer: Rs. 25,000 per person at 3 star, Rs. 50,000 at 4 star and Rs. 62,500 at 5 star, hotel, breakfast and vehicle included. The Gir permit, gypsy and guide are extra.

faq.question: Can we add Diu as well as Gir in 6 days?
faq.answer: Only by cutting a night somewhere else, and the night that gets cut is usually the second Dwarka night, which is the one holding Bet Dwarka. Tell us which matters more and we will build it honestly.

faq.question: Do we drive the same road twice on this plan?
faq.answer: No, and that is the point. The loop runs out via Jamnagar, down the coast on NH51, inland to Gir, then north through Junagadh to Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Is the Gir safari open in July?
faq.answer: No. The Jungle Trail is closed from 16 June to 15 October every year.

final_cta: One loop, five nights, no highway driven twice, from Rs. 25,000 per person. Send your dates and group size on +91 7302265809 and we will confirm the loop direction, the fourth night and the permit timing in one reply.
